---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. …
2. …
3. …

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened (logs, errors, screenshots if relevant).

## Environment

- **Kubernetes version:** (e.g. `kubectl version --short`)
- **IPFS / Kubo version:** (if applicable)
- **Helm chart version / commit:** (if installed via Helm)
- **Driver version / image:** (e.g. `ghcr.io/ptrvsrg/csi-driver-ipfs:latest`)

## Additional context

Any other context, StorageClass/VolumeSnapshotClass YAML, or configuration that might help.
